description: This figure displays two calculated polythermal phase diagram sections for Fe-Mn-Al-0.85C low-density steel system using FactSage. The first section keeps Mn content at 20 wt% and C at 0.85 wt%, with x-axis representing Al content from 0 to 12 wt% and y-axis for temperature from 200 to 1600 °C, marking phase regions including liquid L, austenite γ, δ/α ferrite, carbides M3C, M7C3, M23C6, ordered B2 phase, κ-carbide and β phase; dash-dotted lines indicate β phase formation temperature, while dashed lines represent disorder-to-order transition temperature. The second section fixes Al at 7 wt% and C at 0.85 wt%, with x-axis as Mn content from 0 to 30 wt%, showing phase stability ranges under different Mn concentrations. These diagrams offer clear thermodynamic guidance for composition design and heat treatment formulation of Fe-Mn-Al-C low density steels.
